original_title: CADJ-044 I'm a volleyball mom who's teaching for some reason. The ace, Satomi Goto, 40, asked me to accompany her to her personal practice, so I decided to watch over her, but I got turned on by her thin uniform, and even though I knew I shouldn't, I made a move!
overview: A senior from my university club is coaching a women's volleyball team. He said, "I had to quit suddenly, so I'll leave it to you." The mothers' volleyball coach was forced into the role. The smell of sweat coming from the thin uniform was intensely tormenting my penis, and my crotch was in a terrible state. While I was coaching her while hiding my crotch, I realized that her form was off because her body was too stiff. I suggested a massage and she readily agreed, but in this state, I couldn't help but put my hands on her when I touched her arms, waist, thighs, etc.
title: CADJ 044
